violations.text: No person in certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, another employee will take the food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

Brownies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
The 3-bay sink was observed with a leak. Per PIC, establishment has called a plumber to fix leak with 3-bay. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
